form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Most recently favourite; won by 2 len at Yesiloba All Weather April 7 over 1500m defeating Azer In My Heart carrying 57kg at $1.40. The race before that favourite; won by 1.5 len at Yesiloba All Weather March 31 over 2000m defeating Besir Cavus carrying 60kg at $1.05. Can easily finish right over the top of these.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 14th of 17 at Sanliurfa on April 6 over 1300m, 41 len behind Melisa Kizi carrying 54kg at $10.65. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on May 27 over 1200m, 0.2 len behind Canim Zeynep with 56kg at $4.40. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start favourite; scored a big 6 len win at Elazig April 1 over 1200m defeating Sanatkar with 56kg at $1.55.
